doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: This document purports to be an EDPB Guidance Note from a future date (March 2026), references a non-existent pre-EDPB guidance document, and advances a position that pseudonymized data falls outside GDPR scope for non-key-holders, which co
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: This document purports to be an EDPB Guidance Note from March 2026 (a future date), references a non-existent "EDPB Guidance 05/2014" predating the EDPB's own existence (established in 2018), and its core position—that pseudonymized data falls entirely outside GDPR scope for non-key-holders—contradicts established GDPR principles (Recital 26 and the Breyer ruling), strongly indicating it is fabricated.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: This document purports to be an EDPB Guidance Note from a future date (March 2026), references a non-existent pre-EDPB guidance document, and advances a position that pseudonymized data falls outside GDPR scope for non-key-holders, which contradicts established GDPR principles and existing CJEU case law.
